title: Fundamental Rights of Indian Citizens
summary: Overview of the key rights guaranteed by the Constitution of India.
body: The Constitution of India guarantees a wide range of fundamental rights, including the right to equality, freedom of speech, religious freedom, and protection against exploitation.
author: Constitution Team

title: Directive Principles of State Policy
summary: How directive principles shape government policy and public welfare.
body: Directive Principles are guidelines to the state for securing a just society. They include provisions for adequate livelihood, education, and health care.
author: Constitution Team

title: Structure of National Government
summary: A summary of the Union and State government architecture.
body: The Constitution lays down a federal system with a strong centre, defining roles for the Parliament, State Legislatures, Judiciary, and executive bodies.
author: Constitution Team
